resources.string: No internet connection. Check your network and try again.
The request timed out. Please try again.
Server error. Please try again in a few minutes.
Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
You don\'t have permission to perform this action.
The requested content is not available.
There was a problem processing the response.
Could not read the information. Please try again.
Could not save the information. Please try again.
The requested information was not found.
Biometric authentication is not available on this device.
Too many failed attempts. Biometrics are temporarily locked.
This application cannot be used on this device.
The application integrity could not be verified.
Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
Please review the form fields and try again.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
